---
title: "Wetland_vars_correlations"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)

# Read data
df <- read.csv("daily_wetlands_dataset.csv")

# Define response variables
responses <- c("mean_WT", "max_WT", "range_WT") 

# Define predictor groups
predictor_groups <- list(
  Solar = c("Solar_daily", "Solar_2d", "Solar_3d", "Solar_7d"),
  WL_mean = c("WL_daily_mean", "WL_mean_2day", "WL_mean_3day", "WL_mean_7day"),
  WL_max = c("WL_daily_max", "WL_max_2day", "WL_max_3day", "WL_max_7day"),
  WL_min = c("WL_daily_min", "WL_min_2day", "WL_min_3day", "WL_min_7day"),
  Air_tmean = c("Air_tmean", "Air_tmean_2day", "Air_tmean_3day", "Air_tmean_7day"),
  Air_tmax = c("Air_tmax", "Air_tmax_2day", "Air_tmax_3day", "Air_tmax_7day"),
  Air_tmin = c("Air_tmin", "Air_tmin_2day", "Air_tmin_3day", "Air_tmin_7day"),
  GWT_mean = c("GWT_mean", "GWT_mean_2day", "GWT_mean_3day", "GWT_mean_7day"),
  GWT_max = c("GWT_max", "GWT_max_2day", "GWT_max_3day", "GWT_max_7day"),
  GWT_min = c("GWT_min", "GWT_min_2day", "GWT_min_3day", "GWT_min_7day"),
  GWL_mean = c("GWL_mean", "GWL_mean_2day", "GWL_mean_3day", "GWL_mean_7day"),
  GWL_max = c("GWL_max", "GWL_max_2day", "GWL_max_3day", "GWL_max_7day"),
  GWL_min = c("GWL_min", "GWL_min_2day", "GWL_min_3day", "GWL_min_7day"),
  ppt = c("ppt", "ppt_7day")
)

# Static predictors to keep for all models
static_predictors <- c("Air_trange", "WL_daily_range",
                       "GWT_range", "GWL_range", "Water_area_m2_3d",
                       "Elev_m", "Size_km2")

# Function to find best predictor per group
find_best_predictors <- function(response_var) {
  results <- map_df(predictor_groups, function(vars) {
    # Name each model by its variable name
    models <- set_names(vars) %>% 
      map(~ lm(reformulate(.x, response_var), data = df))
    metrics <- map_dfr(models, glance, .id = "predictor")
    best <- metrics %>% filter(adj.r.squared == max(adj.r.squared, na.rm = TRUE))
    return(best)
  }, .id = "group")
  return(results)
}

# Apply to all responses
best_predictors_all <- map(responses, find_best_predictors)
names(best_predictors_all) <- responses

# Get final list of predictors for each model (best + static)
combined_predictor_lists <- map(best_predictors_all, ~ c(.x$predictor, static_predictors))

# Subset original dataframe for each response model
model_data <- map2(combined_predictor_lists, responses, function(vars, response) {
  df %>%
    select(all_of(c(response, vars)))
})

# Named outputs
mean_model_data <- model_data$mean_WT
max_model_data <- model_data$max_WT
range_model_data <- model_data$range_WT  

```


```{r}
# Load additional packages
library(caret)

# Set correlation threshold
cor_threshold <- 0.9

# Function to remove highly correlated predictors (excluding the response variable)
remove_correlated_predictors <- function(df, response, threshold = cor_threshold) {
  # Extract predictor columns
  predictors <- df %>% select(-all_of(response))
  
  # Compute correlation matrix
  cor_matrix <- cor(predictors, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  
  # Find highly correlated variables
  high_corr <- findCorrelation(cor_matrix, cutoff = threshold, names = TRUE, exact = TRUE)
  
  # Drop the highly correlated variables
  cleaned_df <- df %>% select(-all_of(high_corr))
  
  return(cleaned_df)
}

# Apply to each model dataset
model_data_uncorrelated <- map2(model_data, responses, remove_correlated_predictors)

# Name the list elements
names(model_data_uncorrelated) <- responses

# You now have:
mean_model_final <- model_data_uncorrelated$mean_WT
max_model_final  <- model_data_uncorrelated$max_WT
range_model_final <- model_data_uncorrelated$range_WT

# Optional: check which variables were removed
removed_vars <- map2(model_data, model_data_uncorrelated, function(orig, cleaned) {
  setdiff(names(orig), names(cleaned))
})
names(removed_vars) <- responses

names(mean_model_final)
names(max_model_final)
names(range_model_final)

```
